{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"2026032015144683113CCD5ACE30F1381D\"}"},"total":1218},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7119804108323750689","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"作者写的不错，充分说明了中国军人为了祖国和人民远离 父母 妻儿 在部队艰苦训练磨炼自己！在对外敌作战时不顾生死奋勇杀敌报效祖国。在国人危难时冲锋在前就国人于危难，用生命去守护祖国和人民人之康健。致敬所有人民子弟兵和无人知晓的烈士！还有英雄，你们是祖国和人民心中永远都是最可靠的明星。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1657708669,"group_id":"6870448271106509832","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5IaSUlvnGTtS6oZGmlm6icCjw3RhDvQd0Q742tbX9ok","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776529650\u0026x-signature=hnlAaND2JahZJ5YIbXdCK72Bw34%3D","user_id":"1038395850889368","user_name":"爱吃酱油豆的若白"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1038395850889368","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6870448271106509832","book_info":{"abstract":"穿越到《我是特种兵》世界，得到系统的支持，海军，陆军，空军，特种兵，飞行员等等他都做到了极致，他就是这个世界当之无愧的战争之王","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-images/46bc51524d97f6a7a60a4c1fe7ea1b30","author":"扑街巨星","author_id":"","book_id":"6870448271106509832","book_name":"我是特种兵中的战争之王","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#182020","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":1016,\"name\":\"男频衍生\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1016\u0026name=男频衍生\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":37,\"name\":\"穿越\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37\u0026name=穿越\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":19,\"name\":\"系统\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19\u0026name=系统\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":375,\"name\":\"特种兵\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=375\u0026name=特种兵\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":538,\"name\":\"同人\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538\u0026name=同人\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":852,\"name\":\"魂穿\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852\u0026name=魂穿\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":1079,\"name\":\"衍生\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079\u0026name=衍生\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6870455972549100046","read_count":"11710","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"813976"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.7","serial_count":"386","tags":"男频衍生,系统,穿越,特种兵,同人,魂穿,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-images/373debf3e9be574434e2c8bf7b68de75~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779174887\u0026x-signature=7dKhMDah5TTAtv65G5TcyjJcyl0%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"8.1193605e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"2026032015144683113CCD5ACE30F1381D\"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读24小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":10,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":5002,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":86195,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":6377},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7066822846093525767","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很好看的一本书，但是也有很多不足。开局非洲系统建势力，我以为是在模仿华丽的虚伪，但是到后面就比较有意思了，特别是几次任务，虽然都是借鉴一些电视剧，但我还是看得很过瘾。后面从划分等级开始我觉得这本书就变味儿了，因为你这么写一定不会是战争题材你需要填坑补坑，而且随着权力和军衔的提升，我主要看到的是骑兵等人的出镜，一些其他剧里的主角很少出现了，或者直接一笔带过，不好，我觉得有点可惜。当然后面就逐渐科幻往玄幻里面走了，世界观描写得太大，而且还穿插了一些正常任务的剧情，就让我觉得剧情有些不连贯。你要是把剧情描写得这么大，然后快结尾了，卡，提一下就完本了，真的让人比较难受。但是我觉得比很多系统小说好太多太多了，不失为佳作，可圈可点吧。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1645372916,"group_id":"6870448271106509832","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"哥们儿就是一俗人，没有社科大牛的墨水，看番茄纯是为了爽，若是我这半瓶醋晃荡了大声，还望莫怪。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2Tp9lC+MPB/vSC3jN/HxnsCc0jLI8AUo0wZrdKcQQYU","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/7d43a77dd90a47099031ea597f552c88~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776535513\u0026x-signature=2yTgdHGFl%2BKYBSuyCmw9pRf7Hmk%3D","user_id":"1829208113547719","user_name":"叶问02"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1829208113547719","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1771245701,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"vip","icon":"{\"icon_default_url\":\"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0a6117024b55cf7a088043cdb8fa5d48\",\"icon_dark_url\":\"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9d81e6d86e7f5048ab14f7f77e72ac0f\",\"icon_width\":26,\"icon_height\":16}","intro":"{\"title_name\":\"vip\",\"title_id\":\"vip\",\"icon_type\":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"vip"},{"en_title":"author","intro":"{\"title_name\":\"作家\",\"title_id\":\"author\"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{\"title_text\":\"作家\",\"title_default_color\":\"#FFFFFF\",\"title_dark_color\":\"#FFFFFF\",\"bg_default_color\":\"{\\\"start\\\":\\\"#FF9F31\\\",\\\"end\\\":\\\"#F
